# Name: # 32 MB flash. BOTH OTA slots must sit entirely below the 16 MB
# boundary on ESP32-P4 — see espressif/esp-idf#18051: bootloader_mmap
# returns stale cache lines for flash addresses ≥ 0x01000000 during
# checksum even when the bytes on flash are correct.
#   0x13E0000..0x2000000 triplog (~12.1 MB raw — circular trip time-series log
#                                  boot-time pre-erase of the upcoming sector
#                                  runway keeps mid-ride erases off the ride —
#                                  a flash erase stalls the DSI/render path.)
# Both sit above the 16 MB boundary — data-only
